RoamingPreferredBandType.rationale: Validated rollout path with successful GUI-driven write and restart verification.

RoamAggressiveness.rationale: Low-risk roaming preference with successful staged GUI apply and rollback.

uAPSDSupport.rationale: Low-risk power-save toggle with successful staged GUI apply and rollback.

ThroughputBoosterEnabled.rationale: Low-risk throughput optimization toggle accepted after staged live testing and rollback.

FatChannelIntolerant.rationale: Acceptable medium-risk compatibility toggle after staged live testing and rollback.

ChannelWidth24.rationale: Successful staged GUI WriteOnly apply, read-back, and rollback verification on .221 and on the .221/.222 subset.

Status.rationale: Status is accepted across up to all 8 allowlisted targets per run.

Restart.rationale: Restart is accepted across up to all 8 allowlisted targets per run with explicit confirmation.

Disable.rationale: Disable is accepted across up to all 8 allowlisted targets per run using stored BE200 adapter identity for safe reversal.

Enable.rationale: Enable is accepted across up to all 8 allowlisted targets per run using stored BE200 adapter identity for safe reversal.
